recommendations.title: The Half of It
recommendations.overview: Shy, straight-A student Ellie is hired by sweet but inarticulate jock Paul, who needs help wooing the most popular girl in school. But their new and unlikely friendship gets tricky when Ellie discovers she has feelings for the same girl.

recommendations.title: A Street Cat Named Bob
recommendations.overview: James Bowen, a homeless busker and recovering drug addict, has his life transformed when he meets a stray ginger cat.

recommendations.title: Tomorrow, When the War Began

recommendations.title: Trauma
recommendations.overview: A young Romanian woman and a recovering drug addict launch an unlikely investigation after her parents are murdered by a vicious serial killer known as The Headhunter.

recommendations.title: Avalon High

recommendations.overview: Margaret and Ben take a weekend trip with longtime friends Ellie and Thomas and their two young children. Eventually, Ben begins to suspect something supernatural is occurring when the kids behave strangely after disappearing into the woods overnight
